reference: I am a fifty-three-year-old female, five feet ten inches, one hundred and fifty-five pounds, in good health. Over the last two months, my second toe on my right foot has been swollen, discolored, and feels like there is a rubber band around it. I have been to the doctor, had X-rays and blood work. There are no fractures and I have ruled out gout. I have been on antibiotics for the last five days, but there have been no changes. Any ideas of what to check for next?
text: I am a 53-year-old female, 5 feet 10 inches, 155 pounds, in good health. Over the last 2 months my second toe on my right foot has been swollen, discolored, and feels like there is a rubber band around it. I've been to the doctor, had X-rays, and blood work. There are no fractures, and I have ruled out gout. I have been on antibiotics for the last 5 days, but there have been no changes. Any ideas of what to check for next?
